items.title: Gilla Band Announce New Album Pugnello: Hear “Placeholder”
items.summary: Dublin noisemakers Gilla Band haven't been making a lot of noise lately. The band's most recent album Most Normal came out four years ago. Since then, Gilla Band's members have been pursuing other things, like guitarist Alan Duggan Borges' experimental electronic project the Null Club.

items.title: gash Announce New Album at least you know what you’re laughing at: Hear “good and bad”
items.summary: Angel Tapes, the Fire Talk Records sub-label that brought you artists like ira glass, Shower Curtain, Jawdropped, Sleeper's Bell, and more, just announced their newest signing. It's gash, a group of Eau Claire experimentalists who've earned the endorsement of the Wisconsin city's well-known export Justin Vernon. They'll perform at Vernon's revived Eaux Claires festival later this month.

items.title: Charli XCX’s Lone Music, Fashion, Film Feature Is David Cronenberg
items.summary: At the end of Charli XCX's Coachella set last year, the screen behind her flashed a bunch of possible alternatives for the bygone Brat Summer. One of them was Cronenberg Summer, a fun thing to even think about. How would an entire summer dedicated to Canadian horror movie legend David Cronenberg look?

items.title: Gilla Band announce new album, share “Placeholder”
items.summary: ‘Pugnello’ will be out September 25 via Rough Trade and Gilla Band’s fall tour is with Piss and Annie-Claude Deschênes
